The '''Fyyrsprus''' were a small [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptilians]]. Members of the species were harmless but clumsy. At some point by the time of the existence of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], a group of Fyyrsprus [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] carried out several repair attempts on the custom-built [[Starcat-class Freighter|light freighter]] ''[[Starcat (light freighter)|Starcat]]'' of the [[Happy Blasters]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] group. All the repair attempts were inadequate, leading to the Happy Blasters' [[Human/Legends|Human]] technician [[Mac (Human)|Mac]] organizing efforts by the mercenary group to [[Speciecide|eradicate]] the Fyyrsprus.<ref name="Journal13" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Fyyyrsprus were mentioned in "[[Scouts' Dispatch]]," a feature written by [[Peter Woodworth]] and published in the [[May]] [[1997]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 13|thirteenth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine.<ref name="Journal13" />
